use_cases: Toggle boolean values in forms with click interaction
Select multiple items from a list with visual feedback
Display indeterminate state for parent checkboxes in hierarchical selections
Show disabled state for read-only form scenarios
Provide accessible checkbox with custom styling via Tailwind CSS
ai_summary: A reusable Checkbox component with support for checked, unchecked, disabled, and indeterminate states. Built with Tailwind CSS featuring group-hover effects for visual feedback and an accessible hidden input for screen readers. The component uses a minimal, flat design aesthetic with clean gray tones and rounded borders, making it suitable for various SaaS, e-commerce, and developer tooling applications.
